function.name: _automatic_save_define
function.description: Save automation configuration. Used to create or update a complete automation workflow definition.

id.description: Automation ID (system unique). Must NOT be provided when creating; must be provided when editing.

opt.description: Condition connection method. Only one of the following values can be used: and (AND), or (OR). Default is and.

Operator. Only one of the following values can be used (corresponding to Java OPT_* constants):
eq (equals), ne (not equals), gt (greater than), ge (greater than or equal), lt (less than), le (less than or equal),
contains (contains), notcontains (does not contain), startswith (starts with), endswith (ends with),
isnull (is null), isnotnull (is not null), in (in list), notin (not in list),
between (between range), notbetween (not between range),
parentrooteq (root parent equals), parenteq (parent equals), parentcontains (parent contains),
multipleandquery (multi-value AND query), multipleorquery (multi-value OR query), intree (in tree)

value.description: Comparison value expression. If an expression function is used, it must be defined in the Informat Expression SDK documentation and must not be fabricated. Therefore, you must first call the tool `_read_informat_expression_doc` to read the expression documentation before generating any function.

func.description:
Field processing function name. Only one of the following values can be used:
length (length), nlevel (number of levels), nameOfAccount (account name),
day (day), month (month), week (week), quarter (quarter), year (year),
dayofyear (day of year), dayofmonth (day of month), weekofyear (week of year),
daytonow (days to now), weektonow (weeks to now), monthtonow (months to now),
quartertonow (quarters to now), yeartonow (years to now),
fmtday (formatted day), fmtweek (formatted week), fmtmonth (formatted month),
fmtquarter (formatted quarter), fmtyear (formatted year),
hour (hour), minute (minute), second (second)

var.description: Whether it is an expression. Must be set to true, indicating the value is an expression. Default is true.

FieldMappingItem.description: Field assignment mapping.user for InsertRecord / UpdateRecord。

valueType.description: Value type. Must be set to var, indicating the value is an expression.

type.description:
Step type. [Strict constraint] Only one of the following values can be used; using any type not listed is strictly prohibited:
Log (print log), Http (HTTP request), If (conditional branch; must include two child nodes: If.true and If.false),
If.true (true branch child node of If), If.false (false branch child node of If),
ForEach (loop iteration), Abort (terminate execution), Sleep (wait), Script (execute script),
InsertRecord (insert record), UpdateRecord (update record), DeleteRecord (delete record),
QueryRecordList (query record list), QueryRecordListCount (query record count),
SetReturnValue (set return value), Notification (send notification),
OutputDynamicForm (output dynamic form), OutputConfirm (output confirmation dialog), OutputUpload (file upload interaction)

retValues.description: Output variable list of the current step. Subsequent steps can reference them using ${variableName}.

isError.description: Whether this is an abnormal termination. If true, the automation transaction will be rolled back.

remarkVar.description: Error message description. Only effective when isError is true

sleepTime.description: Sleep time in milliseconds expression. For example, 5000 means 5 seconds.

ifFuncSetting.description: If is a control node and cannot execute logic directly. It must contain exactly two child nodes: If.true and If.false. Actual execution steps must be defined inside their children.

listVar.description: List expression such as ${list}. Must reference a variable from previous steps. Cannot be arbitrarily defined.

method.description: HTTP request method. Only one of the following values can be used: Get, Post, Put, Delete, Head, Options.

bodyFormat.description:
Request body format. Only one of the following values can be used:
None (no request body), UrlEncode (URL-encoded, used together with bodyUrlEncodeList),
FormData (form data, used together with bodyFormDataList), Raw (raw content, used together with bodyRaw)

bodyRaw.description: Raw request body content. Only valid when bodyFormat=Raw.

bodyFormDataList.description: FormData body. Only valid when bodyFormat=FormData.

bodyUrlEncodeList.description: UrlEncode body. Only valid when bodyFormat=UrlEncode.

timeout.description: Request timeout in seconds. 0 means use default 30 seconds.

type.description:
Notification type. Only one of the following values can be used, and the corresponding setting must be provided based on the type:
openurl (open a link, urlSetting must also be provided),
openrecord (open a form record, recordSetting must also be provided),
openbpmntask (open a BPMN task, bpmnTaskSetting must also be provided),
invokeautomatic (invoke automation, automaticSetting must also be provided)

recordSetting.description: open record setting，only valid when type=openrecord

bpmnTaskSetting.description: open bpmn task，only valid when type=openbpmntask

code.description: Script code. Do not use 'return' at the end of the script. If you need to set a return value for the entire automation, use automatic.setReturnValue. Before writing scripts, refer to the Informat script documentation. You can use the tool `_read_office_file` to retrieve the documentation.

countVar.description: Page size (string expression). For example: "100" or ${pageSize}.

indexVar.description: Page index (string expression). For example: "1" or ${pageIndex}.

type.description: Sorting order. asc = ascending, desc = descending.

fieldList.description: ist of fields to query (used in non-aggregation queries). Empty means query all fields.

aggregation.description: Whether to execute an aggregation query.

aggregationQueryList.description: Aggregation query definition list (required when aggregation=true).

func.description:
Aggregation function (required). Only one of the following values can be used:
count (count; fieldId can be omitted to represent count(*); distinct is meaningful),
avg (average; fieldId must be provided; distinct is meaningless and should not be set to true),
sum (sum; fieldId must be provided; distinct is meaningless),
max (maximum; fieldId must be provided; distinct is meaningless),
min (minimum; fieldId must be provided; distinct is meaningless)

fieldId.description: Aggregation field ID. For count, it can be empty to represent count(*).

distinct.description: Whether to apply DISTINCT (only meaningful for count).

aggregationSplitMultiValue.description: Whether to split multi-value fields during aggregation.

returnOptionName.description: Whether to return the display name of option fields.

outputConfirmFuncSetting.description: Confirmation dialog configuration. Used to pause the automation flow and wait for user confirmation.

confirmTitleHorizontalAlign.description: Text horizontal alignment. Only one of the following values can be used: left (align left), center (align center), right (align right).

confirmTitleVerticalAlign.description: Text vertical alignment. Only one of the following values can be used: top (top), middle (middle), bottom (bottom).

uploadType.description: File storage mode. File = store in shared storage. Base64 = return Base64 encoded content.

maxSize.description: Maximum file size (MB). 0 means no limit.

id.description: Field ID. Must be lowercase letters, 10–13 characters, randomly generated and unique.

key.description: Field identifier. CamelCase format, letters only, randomly generated and unique.

type.description:
Dynamic form field type. Only one of the following values can be used:
SingleText (single-line text), MultiText (multi-line text), RichText (rich text),
Integer (integer), Double (decimal), Date (date), ListSelect (dropdown select),
Attachment (attachment), Checkbox (checkbox), User (user), Department (department),
Coordinate (coordinate), RelationRecord (relation record), Children (tree structure), ID (business ID)

fieldId.description: Target field ID. Must exist in dynamicFormFieldList.

dynamicFormSubmitBeforeAutomaticId.description: Automation ID to execute before form submission.

dynamicFormSubmitBeforeAutomaticVarList.description: Parameter list for the pre-submit automation.

dynamicFormEnableFieldValidate.description: Whether to enable field validation. Currently fixed to false; do not set it to true.

AutomaticFunction.description:
Automation step node.

[type → Required setting and retValues rules (mandatory; missing any is a serious error)]

  Log               → logFuncSetting must be provided
  Sleep             → sleepFuncSetting must be provided
  Abort             → abortFuncSetting must be provided
  Script            → scriptFuncSetting must be provided
  If                → ifFuncSetting and children must be provided (children must contain exactly two child nodes:
                       the first type=If.true, the second type=If.false; the actual execution steps are written inside their children)
  If.true           → no additional setting required; exists as a child node of If
  If.false          → no additional setting required; exists as a child node of If
  ForEach           → forEachFuncSetting and retValues must be provided (fixed 2 items:
                       item1: {id:'object', name:'List item'}; item2: {id:'idx', name:'Index'})
  Http              → httpFuncSetting and retValues must be provided (fixed 3 items:
                       {id:'response',name:'Response value'}, {id:'code',name:'Response code'}, {id:'header',name:'Response header'})
  Notification      → notificationFuncSetting must be provided
  InsertRecord      → insertRecordFuncSetting and retValues must be provided (fixed 1 item: {id:'record',name:'Inserted record'})
  UpdateRecord      → updateRecordFuncSetting and retValues must be provided (fixed 2 items:
                       {id:'count',name:'Updated record count'}, {id:'recordIdList',name:'Updated record ID list'})
  DeleteRecord      → deleteRecordFuncSetting must be provided
  QueryRecordList   → queryRecordListFuncSetting and retValues must be provided (fixed 1 item: {id:'list',name:'Record list'})
                       When referenced in subsequent steps use ${recordList} instead of ${list}, and use ${recordList.size()} instead of .length for the count
  QueryRecordListCount → queryRecordListCountFuncSetting and retValues must be provided (fixed 1 item: {id:'result',name:'Query list count'})
  OutputConfirm     → outputConfirmFuncSetting and retValues must be provided (fixed 1 item: {id:'result',name:'Confirmed or not'})
  OutputUpload      → outputUploadFuncSetting and retValues must be provided (fixed 1 item: {id:'result',name:'File list'})
                       When referenced in subsequent steps use ${fileList} instead of ${result}, and use ${fileList.size()} for the count
  OutputDynamicForm → outputDynamicFormFuncSetting and retValues must be provided (fixed 1 item: {id:'result',name:'Form data'})
  SetReturnValue    → no additional setting required
